message:
feat(dashboard): add createVsockSession for vsock terminal

Add method to TerminalHandler that creates vsock connections to VMs
using the shell protocol. Validates CID, dials vsock, creates session,
and sends the Open message with terminal info.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
